category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks Have I Been Pwned to see if passwords should be changed; official README says it checks Have I Been Pwned.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is checkpwn; official GitHub README heading uses checkpwn.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, API key registration, account checks, and password checks.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/brycx/checkpwn; official GitHub README identifies the project as brycx/checkpwn.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Have I Been Pwned and password changes; official GitHub topics include security, password, hibp, haveibeenpwned, and data-breach.
